data.title: Investment firm ARK Invest purchases $30M in Coinbase & $17M in BitMine stocks on Friday during market downturn.
data.description: On Friday, ARK Invest made significant investments in the cryptocurrency market. They allocated $30 million towards purchasing shares of Coinbase and $17 million towards acquiring shares of BitMine. These purchases were made during a period of price declines in both assets.

data.title: Consumers now feeling impact of tariffs as prices rise after delay, showing effects of President's levies.
data.description: There are increasing indications that the tariffs imposed by President Trump are starting to impact consumer prices, as companies are running out of strategies to maintain stability amidst the situation.

data.title: Will Trump's tariffs help reduce economic inequality? Despite aiming to protect workers, trade barriers may not bring back factories or close income disparities.
data.description: The president is targeting his trade policies towards workers who have been negatively impacted by globalization. However, it is important to note that implementing trade barriers may not necessarily lead to the revival of factories or bridge income disparities.

data.title: Oddly-shaped lots could aid housing crisis as more U.S. cities allow building on irregular plots amid escalating needs.
data.description: With increasing demands, numerous cities and states in the U.S. are simplifying the process of constructing on unconventional and previously neglected properties.

data.title: ENS price dips to $25.25 (-2.55%) despite high exchange outflows after a 60% surge caused by 250K token withdrawals.
data.description: The Ethereum Name Service is currently trading at $25.25, experiencing a 2.55% decrease as bulls take a break after a significant 60% increase in the previous week. This surge was fueled by 250,000 token withdrawals from exchanges.

data.title: Avast named top cybersecurity software by Software Experts, recognized as the best antivirus in August 2025.
data.description: In New York on August 2, 2025, the growing importance of strong, multi-platform cybersecurity solutions was emphasized due to increasing digital threats and reliance on personal devices. As a response to this, Avast was awarded as the Best Antivirus by Software Experts. This recognition highlights the significance of reliable cybersecurity in today's tech-driven world.

data.title: GitHub plans to phase out GPU machine type in Codespaces by August 2025 due to Azure retiring NCv3-series VMs. Developers advised to prepare for the change.
data.description: GitHub has revealed plans to retire GPU machine types in Codespaces by August 29, 2025, aligning with Azure's NCv3-series VMs phaseout. This move necessitates developers to make necessary preparations for the forthcoming transition.

data.title: Filecoin (FIL) price plunges to $2.30 after breaking crucial $2.38 support, with RSI at 36.42 indicating bearish momentum.
data.description: Shares of FIL are currently trading at $2.30, reflecting a 1.33% decrease in value following a break below a significant support level. Key technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 36.42 and the price approaching the lower limits of the Bollinger Bands. These metrics point to negative momentum in the market.

data.title: Celestia's TIA now at $1.62 (-2.35%) from failed $2.16 resistance breakout. Foundation buys $62.5M tokens, new upgrade reduces inflation by 33%.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TIA is currently trading at $1.62, which reflects a daily decrease of 2.35%. This drop comes after a failed breakout above resistance levels. Despite this, the Foundation has made a significant purchase of tokens worth $62.5 million. Additionally, there is excitement surrounding the upcoming Lotus upgrade, which is expected to reduce inflation by 33%. These developments have generated interest in the cryptocurrency's future performance.

data.title: AAVE drops to $253.26 (-1.39%) after hitting $249 support. Monthly gains of 95% driven by Aave V4 progress.
data.description: The digital currency AAVE is currently trading at $253.26, showing a decrease of 1.39%. Despite this dip, investors remain optimistic as support levels have been successfully defended. AAVE has seen a remarkable 95% increase in value over the past month, largely attributed to advancements in Aave V4 development.

data.title: Crypto VC investment down in Q2 2025 due to changing landscape. Numbers show a significant decline in funding for startups. Learn more.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, venture capital funding for cryptocurrency and blockchain startups saw a notable decrease. This decline is a result of the difficult overall economic conditions and changing preferences of investors. The shift led to a significant drop in funding compared to previous quarters, highlighting the challenges faced by startups in this sector.

data.title: LDO price falls to $0.89 (-3.89%) amid Lido DAO market share worries as it drops to 25%, signaling bearish patterns despite whale accumulation.
data.description: The digital asset LDO is currently trading at $0.89, representing a 3.89% decrease in its daily value. This drop comes as Lido DAO's stake in the Ethereum market falls to 25%, prompting negative technical indicators despite a notable increase in whale holdings.

data.title: PEPE price tests critical support amidst mixed signals. With 1.44% gains, technicals suggest oversold conditions, signaling possible buy opportunity.
data.description: PEPE has experienced a slight increase in trading with gains of 1.44%. Despite this positive movement, technical analysis suggests a bearish trend and oversold conditions, indicating a potential buying opportunity as the price approaches support levels.

data.title: India plans to purchase Russian oil despite Trump's warning. Trump threatened action if India doesn't halt Russian imports.
data.description: Last week, President Trump stated his intention to levy consequences against India if the country does not reduce its purchases of Russian oil. However, the President did not provide details on what actions would be taken in response.

data.title: Sei extends Accelathon deadline, plans AI event in NYC for collaboration among builders & devs.
data.description: Sei, an organization, has decided to prolong the deadline for the Accelathon, an event aimed at promoting collaboration among AI builders and developers. Furthermore, they have revealed plans for an in-person gathering in New York City to facilitate this collaboration.

data.title: ALGO price hits key $0.24 support amid USDT exit, trading at $0.24 (-0.84%). Technicals hint at possible rebound pre-roadmap.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Algorand is currently trading at $0.24, representing a slight decrease of 0.84%. The withdrawal of USDT has presented challenges for the currency, but technical analysis indicates a possible recovery in anticipation of the upcoming roadmap release.

data.title: Jay Yu has joined Pantera Capital as a strategic partner, boosting their blockchain investment strategies.
data.description: Pantera Capital, a leading investment firm specializing in blockchain technologies, has welcomed Jay Yu as its newest strategic partner. With this appointment, Pantera aims to strengthen its investment strategies in the blockchain sector. Yu’s expertise and experience are expected to contribute significantly to the firm's growth. This move reflects Pantera Capital's commitment to expanding its presence in the industry.

data.title: INJ price steady at $12.68 with RSI 45.00, testing key $12.20 support. Ethernia upgrade, Cboe ETF filing show promise.
data.description: The stock symbol INJ is currently trading at $12.68 with a neutral RSI of 45.00. It is approaching a critical support level around $12.20. Positive factors such as the recent Ethernia upgrade and Cboe ETF filing are serving as bullish catalysts, hinting at a possible breakout.

data.title: CRV price falls to $0.90 after a 2.23% drop, following a recent 79% rally. Curve Token undergoes technical correction.
data.description: The cryptocurrency CRV is currently valued at $0.90, reflecting a decrease of 2.23% over the course of one day. This decline follows a significant 79% increase last week that saw Curve surpass the $1 mark, driven by notable bullish momentum in the market.

data.title: Toncoin rises by 6.15% to $3.61, aiming for $3.72 resistance level as TON RSI nears overbought area.
data.description: Toncoin is currently being traded at $3.61, representing a 6.15% increase from the previous day's trading. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for TON is nearing overbought levels, suggesting potential for a price correction. Bullish investors are aiming to surpass the resistance level at $3.72.
